verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As a man I admit I have so many mistakes In my eyes, in my mind, in my heart always especially by the words I say Errors I can see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But Lord You know what I have in me What my heart thinks before Thee To please men is not my desire be pleasing to You is what I aspire

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To be honest in all honesty to be sincere in all sincerity to be faithful with all integrity till I see myself in Your image Lord Till all Your ways be my ways and we are one

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: To be loyal in all loyalty to be waiting, waiting for Thee Till all Your Love, Till all Your Deity Reveals in me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord I know You have set Your predestinated plan In Your mind I was there perfect in Your sight With Power and authority I was with You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: By Your grace I will endure By Your Spirit I will overcome Look to You to avoid the fall Strive my best to live Your call
